# Synaps Group

> Synaps Group delivers mining expertise, international trade, real estate, agribusiness and social impact projects from Madagascar.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Synaps Group activities and pillars.
- [About](/about): Company story, values and sectors of operation.
- [Mining Services](/services): Consulting, mandate buy & sell, exploration and operations.
- [Synaps Mining](/mining): Exploration, operations and export of Malagasy minerals.
- [Synaps Real Estate](/real-estate): Premium properties in Madagascar — Sahaza, Ambohimarina, Mahajanga, Sainte-Marie.
- [Synaps Agribusiness](/agribusiness): Sustainable agriculture, agro-processing and food security.
- [Trade & Export](/trade): International trade of sea sands, river sands, red soils and chrome ore.
- [Projects](/projects): Flagship projects across mining, real estate, trade and impact.
- [Association Neurones Madagascar](/association): Non-profit serving 5,000+ Malagasy students.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Synaps Group team.
